creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Cy Schubert from comment #7)

Hm, maybe a recreation of the 14.0-CURRENT amd64 jail could actually help in that case.

I updated the host and the amd64 jail to base 036af1053ac and I was able to build devel/py-Jinja2 and devel/py-zipp without any issues. Even "poudriere bulk -J1" worked smoothly.
